jobs.description: Supplementary heartbeat — confirms gateway was healthy at fire time. NOT a liveness indicator: if gateway is down this cron will not fire. Use watchdog + hermes-health.sh for authoritative liveness.
jobs.command: bash -c 'source ~/.bashrc 2>/dev/null; ~/.hermes_prod/scripts/hermes-health.sh --quiet; STATUS=$?; if [ $STATUS -eq 0 ]; then MSG="✅ Hermes gateway healthy ($(date +%H:%M))"; elif [ $STATUS -eq 1 ]; then MSG="⚠️ Hermes gateway DEGRADED — warnings detected — run: hermes-health.sh for details"; else MSG="🚨 Hermes gateway DOWN — failures detected — run: hermes-health.sh + watchdog for details"; fi; curl -s -X POST https://slack.com/api/chat.postMessage -H "Authorization: Bearer ${SLACK_BOT_TOKEN:-${SLACK_MCP_XOXB_TOKEN:-}}" -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\"channel\":\"C0AJQ5M0A0Y\",\"text\":\"$MSG\"}" > /dev/null'
